note: Outcome-learning loop release. Adds confidence column, reinforce() function, ingest() guards, stats() distribution columns, and two new recall_hybrid() output columns. The scoring formula change (+0.025*confidence in aux_scale term) has a bounded max impact of +0.025 pts on the final_score of a 1.0-confidence lesson vs 0.5-confidence baseline. This is an additive tie-breaking term — it does not affect recall@10 on benchmarks where lessons have uniform confidence (default 0.5). Real-DB bench carry-forward is valid per analytical argument below.

outcome_learning_loop.description: confidence REAL DEFAULT 0.5 on agent_lesson; reinforce(lesson_id, outcome) RETURNS REAL; success_count/fail_count columns; ingest() guards; stats() distribution
outcome_learning_loop.scoring_impact: bounded: +0.025 * delta_confidence in aux_scale term. At default confidence=0.5, existing benchmarks are unaffected. Impact accrues only as reinforce() is called over time.
outcome_learning_loop.signature_impact: recall_hybrid() output gains confidence REAL and match_confidence REAL columns (17 total, was 15)
outcome_learning_loop.known_caller_impact: Callers selecting * from recall_hybrid() gain 2 new columns. Explicit column selection unaffected.

bug_fix.description: graph_proximity CTE alias bug in recall_hybrid(): FROM graph_walk WHERE gw.depth>0 lacked gw alias — caused ERROR: missing FROM-clause entry for table 'gw'. Fixed in both pgmnemo--0.7.0.sql and pgmnemo--0.6.3--0.7.0.sql.
bug_fix.scoring_impact: graph traversal path was previously broken (error). Fix enables graph-boosted scoring for lessons with mem_edge connections. No impact on corpus without mem_edge rows.

carry_forward_rationale: Benchmark suite (LongMemEval-S) uses uniform confidence values (all 0.5 from DEFAULT). The +0.025*confidence term contributes identically across all candidates at DEFAULT confidence, leaving rank order unchanged. recall@10 carry-forward is valid for uniform-confidence corpora. Once reinforce() is called in production, a separate bench run with differentiated confidence values should be executed.

tests: pg_regress test_confidence (T1-T9: confidence column, reinforce(), recall ranking, ingest guards, stats distribution)
fresh install: CREATE EXTENSION pgmnemo VERSION '0.7.0'
upgrade path: CREATE EXTENSION pgmnemo VERSION '0.6.3' + ALTER EXTENSION pgmnemo UPDATE TO '0.7.0'
smoke_gate.new_test: test_confidence — covers full v0.7.0 outcome-learning loop (T1-T9)
